svg.style: font-family:Lato, 'Helvetica Neue', Helvetica, Arial, 'Liberation Sans', sans-serif;font-feature-settings:"liga", "kern", "calt", "lnum";text-rendering:geometricPrecision;-webkit-font-smoothing:antialiased;font-size:18px;background-color:#ffffff

a.style: font-family:'Playfair Display', Georgia, 'Times New Roman', 'Liberation Serif', serif

text.tspan: (changed) People living in countries that have universal voting rights,
This does not consider elections being postponed, informal restrictions on voting rights, or legal restrictions based on age,
criminal conviction, disability, or local residency.
Data source: Skaaning et al. (2024); Population based on various sources (2024)
